overall.description: A cinematic view of a grand medieval dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, long wooden tables with seated figures in dark robes, and high Gothic stone architecture. The warm candlelight creates a magical atmosphere in what appears to be high-quality game engine footage.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand Gothic dining hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Students in dark robes are seated at long wooden house tables lining both sides, while a head table with white cloth sits at the center front. Tall stone pillars and arched windows line the sides beneath a high vaulted ceiling, creating a magical medieval atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a grand Gothic dining hall that emphasizes the scale and magical atmosphere of the medieval space. It begins with a wide view of the vaulted ceiling where hundreds of floating candles cast a warm, flickering glow over the entire room. The perspective then settles on the long wooden house tables lining both sides, where students in dark robes sit in quiet assembly. Finally, the gaze centers on the head table draped in white cloth, framed by the towering stone pillars and arched windows that define the hall's imposing architecture.
